shopDetails.bio: Leading supplier of structural steel and quality cement in Chennai for 20 years.
One-stop shop for all finishing materials and plumbing fixtures.
Specialists in Fe 550 TMT bars and heavy structural sections.

materials.name: Cement
materials.description: High-strength Ordinary Portland Cement (OPC) and Portland Pozzolana Cement (PPC) grade. Ideal for all general construction, including concrete, mortar, and plaster. Features superior fine grinding for a smooth finish and excellent durability against weather.

reviews.comment: Good quality, but delivery was a bit slow.

materials.name: TMT Steel
materials.description: Thermo-Mechanically Treated (TMT) steel bars for superior structural integrity. Fe 500 and Fe 550 grades available for high-rise buildings and earthquake-prone zones. Features rib patterns for better bonding with concrete.

reviews.comment: Best TMT bars I have used. Very flexible and strong.

materials.name: Bricks
materials.description: Premium red clay bricks and fly ash bricks. High compressive strength and low water absorption. Perfect for load-bearing walls and aesthetic brickwork.

reviews.comment: Clean edges, very few breakages in the batch.

materials.name: River Sand
materials.description: High-quality M-Sand (Manufactured Sand) and natural River Sand. Sieve-filtered to remove impurities and clay. Ideal for masonry, plastering, and concrete work.

materials.name: Gravel
materials.description: Crushed blue metal gravel for high-strength concrete. Available in 20mm for slabs and 40mm for foundation work. Sharply graded for maximum density.

materials.name: Floor Tiles
materials.description: Elegant vitrified and ceramic floor tiles with anti-skid properties. Wide range of patterns including marble, wooden, and stone finishes. Easy to clean and highly durable.

reviews.comment: Beautiful finish, looks like real marble!

materials.name: Interior Paint
materials.description: Premium interior emulsion paint with high washability and stain resistance. Low VOC and antifungal properties for a healthy home environment. Over 2000+ shades available.

reviews.comment: Great coverage, only needed two coats for a dark wall.
